testcase.name: test_market_data_has_required_keys

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing key 'icon' in market item nifty_50 assert 'icon' in {'change': 102.5, 'change_percent': 0.4, 'key': 'nifty_50', 'last_updated': '2026-02-18T09:51:11.602696+00:00', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_market_data_invest_screen.py:57: in test_market_data_has_required_keys assert key in item, f"Missing key '{key}' in market item {item.get('key')}" E AssertionError: Missing key 'icon' in market item nifty_50 E assert 'icon' in {'change': 102.5, 'change_percent': 0.4, 'key': 'nifty_50', 'last_updated': '2026-02-18T09:51:11.602696+00:00', ...}

testcase.name: test_market_data_nifty_50
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_market_data_invest_screen.py:77: in test_market_data_nifty_50 assert nifty_50['icon'] == "chart-line" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'icon'

testcase.name: test_market_data_sensex
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_market_data_invest_screen.py:91: in test_market_data_sensex assert sensex['icon'] == "chart-areaspline" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'icon'

testcase.name: test_market_data_nifty_bank
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_market_data_invest_screen.py:102: in test_market_data_nifty_bank assert nifty_bank['icon'] == "bank" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'icon'

testcase.name: test_market_data_gold
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_market_data_invest_screen.py:112: in test_market_data_gold assert gold['icon'] == "diamond-stone" ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'icon'

testcase.name: test_market_data_silver
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_market_data_invest_screen.py:122: in test_market_data_silver assert silver['icon'] == "diamond-outline" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'icon'
